case_title: RANDALL ZURCHER VS. LINDA L NORTON et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-31-2005 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING JAN-31-2005 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS THAT A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE IN LIGHT OF THE HISTORY OF FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDERS AND RULES NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance.Proceedings reported by: Lois Jones (212)
